title: Board Game Incident
description: You flipped the board after losing Candy Land. Investigation ongoing.

choices.text: Demand a rematch. Best of three.
choices.flavor: You lost two more. The board was flipped two more times. Pattern emerging.
Mom is proud. You still think the game was rigged, but you kept it together.

choices.text: Announce you are done with board games forever
choices.flavor: This boycott lasts approximately forty-five minutes.

title: Rules Lawyer
description: You learned the rules of tag. You immediately found a loophole.

choices.flavor: 'Base' is wherever you are standing. Nobody agreed to this. You do not care.

choices.text: Suggest a rule change to make it fairer
choices.flavor: The other kids agree to your amendment. First legislative achievement.

title: Taking It Too Seriously
description: It is a casual game of kickball at recess. You are treating it like the Super Bowl.

choices.flavor: You kicked it over the fence. Home run. The game stopped because there is no ball now.

choices.text: Dial it back and let everyone have fun
choices.flavor: You still won, but people actually wanted to play with you again.

title: The Tall Climbing Wall
description: The big kids' climbing wall at the park. It is taller than you thought.

choices.flavor: Hands scraped. Knees skinned. Made it to the top. Worth every scratch.

choices.text: Climb carefully, one handhold at a time
choices.flavor: Slow and steady. You made it. Less dramatic, equally effective.
Not today. You decide the swings are fine. Nothing wrong with knowing your limits.

title: Birthday Party Plan
description: It is your birthday. Your parents ask what kind of party you want.

choices.flavor: Football, relay races, capture the flag. Your friends are exhausted but smiling.

choices.text: Big party with the whole class
choices.flavor: Everyone shows up. Cake, games, presents. You are the center of attention.
Just your best friends. Quality over quantity.

title: Wrestling in the Yard
description: Older cousin challenges you to wrestle in the grass. He is bigger but you are quick.

choices.flavor: You are too fast to pin down. Your cousin cannot believe it.
You get tossed around but refuse to quit. Toughness matters.
